input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule S.4.7.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: s.4.7.1
            TITLE: teams may bring to design judging any photographs, drawings, plans, charts, example

            CONTENT:
            rule S.4.7.1: Teams may bring to Design Judging any photographs, drawings, plans, charts, example
S.4.7.1 Teams may bring to Design Judging any photographs, drawings, plans, charts, example 
components or other materials that they believe are needed to support the presentation of 
the vehicle and the discussion of their development process.

final_answer: Teams may bring to Design Judging any photographs, drawings, plans, charts, example components or other materials that they believe are needed to support the presentation of the vehicle and the discussion of their development process.
